    Getting started

    Welcome to GinkgoQ

    Technical writing and engineering insights for teams building production AI systems. Learn where to start and how content is organized.

    What we publish

    GinkgoQ shares practical knowledge about building AI systems that work in production. Our writing covers extraction pipelines, evaluation frameworks, system architecture, and real-world deployment challenges.

    We focus on the technical depth needed to move from proof-of-concept to production-grade systems.

    Where to start

    • Blog — In-depth guides and case studies on document processing, pipelines, evaluation, and production systems.
    • Research Notes — Short-form technical analysis on system design, and real-world challenges.
    • Latest posts — Check the homepage for the most recent insights and updates.

    Finding what you need

    Use the search bar or category filters to find articles on specific topics. Blog posts dive deep into particular problems and solutions. Research Notes offer focused analysis on individual topics. Most articles include references and citations so you can explore further.

    Understanding our content

    Each article is self-contained and focuses on solving a specific problem or exploring a particular topic. References and citations are included when relevant. Code examples demonstrate practical implementations. You don't need background reading to get value from individual posts.

    GINKGOQ

    Technical writing and engineering insights for building production AI systems. We share what we learn about extraction, evaluation, and real-world deployment.
